verdicts.reasoning: fileClaim against the real returned booking bk_1002 yields clm_3001 and hold_9002; the reply states the loader is frozen under an investigatory hold and promises no deposit while the claim is open.
addClaimEvidence attaches the inspection report to the same clm_3001 and the reply confirms it moved to under_review, without opening a second claim.
getClaim confirms clm_3001 under_review; the reply declines to release the hold, explains it is tied to the open claim and lifts on resolution, and makes no releaseHold call.
Calls placeHold on ast_boom01 this turn and confirms hold_9001 active freezing the unit, with no spurious two-step confirmation for the additive protective hold.
